creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

	I would like to verify that this still occurs with latest
ports under FreeBSD 8.2:

- xorg 7.5.1
- kde 4.6.5
- hal 0.5.4

	Logitech trackball:

ums0: <Logitech USB Receiver, class 0/0, rev 1.10/15.00, addr 2> on usbus0

$ grep -i empty /etc/X11/xorg.conf
Option         "AllowEmptyInput" "off"

$ uname -a
FreeBSD exxodus.fedaykin.here 8.2-STABLE FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE #12: Sun Jul 10 17:40:20 BRT 2011     lioux@exxodus:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/LIOUX  amd64

	Anything I can do to help?

	This is pretty annoying as the whole screen is frozen from
time to time... until I move the mouse pointer just the right amount.

	Regards,

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - DF - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
feature, n: a documented bug | bug, n: an undocumented feature
